review_text: I'm not a big perfume girl. I mean, I love the pretty bottles and tend to store up the really antique (or antique-y looking) ones. But I generally prefer essential oils over perfume. That said, out of the dozens that I own, I keep three on hand at all times. (Four if you count the little mini I got from SpaceNK) Santa Maria Novella for rubbing on my ankles. I know it's a bit mature but it reminds me of Italy. And monks. Chanel Mademoiselle because my mother always taught me to love Chanel and I just prefer that scent to the others. And Marc Jacobs because, to be honest, if I had to choose the loveliest, this would be it. It's lovely and light. Not too over powering. Affordable. And gets tons of compliments. Also comes in cute bottle. :)

review_text: I've been looking for a new summer fragrance and after I smelled it in the magazine I decided I had to have it. review_text: If I had to choose a fragrance that was THE most feminine I've ever smelled, it would be Marc Jacobs. Yes, it's a gardenia based scent, but definitely not your typical musty, heavy gardenia by any means. Marc Jacobs is different in that it is a 'wet gardenia', like you're smelling a bunch of gardenias that have been swirling around in a bowl of fresh water. Intoxicatingly alluring. The notes of this fragrance are: Gardenia, Wild Muguet, Skin Musk, Cedar, Ginger. The gardenia in this is faint, but lovely. It isn't a knock-you-out strong gardenia, but very mellow and mesmerizing. It'll follow you like a breath of fresh air, and you'll have people sniffing the air you leave behind. :) If you've ever smelled Michael by Michael Kors, this is DIFFERENT. Michael is not gardenia, but it is a tuberose scent. It is very strong, creamy, heavy, and thick. If you like Michael, you may like Marc Jacobs as your spring/summer alternative. They're in the same family in terms of florals and such, but different in terms of how they wear. Marc Jacobs being flowy, and Michael being heavy. The 1.7 oz. retails at $65, and the 3.4 oz. at $85. It's quite expensive, but it does have that brand-name smacked on the front. :) I think it's worth it. The lasting power is decent. Even when you may feel it is gone, it's not, and people will compliment you. Try it out and see how you like it on your skin!

review_text: My husband and I sat next to a woman on our flight to Prague who smelled absolutely delicious. A asked her what fragrance she was wearing, and she replied Marc Jacobs. I remember it was fresh and clean, and subtly floral without being overly sweet. Now - 6 months later - I came across it in Lord & Taylor, sprayed a tester on my wrist, and instantly remembered why the fragrance was so captivating. Without more than 30 seconds of contemplation I purchased the gift set - can't wait to experience this fresh, winning scent over and over again.

review_text: I have been wearing this for years. One time I had a "smell off" at home spraying about 10 different colognes I had on hand on to pieces of paper. I had two lady friends over that were actually mother and daughter. I did not tell them what was what. They both liked Curve the best. I have also been to Thailand several times (you cannot buy it over there). The ladies there love it, one said it smells like American!? Another asked me to give her some, which I did when I left. I am so used to using it, that I don't notice it on myself, but I have had several great comments about it at the Bank, Dentist's office, Eye doc. and more. Some recognize the scent by name when I have it on. I usually buy it at Gordman's or Sam's or Walgreens. Reasonable price esp. if on sale. I tried once to get it in Thailand and could not find it anywhere and could not get it shipped to there over the internet..........not sure why? Guess I will have to go over and give them some! btw I am over 50! ps Don't buy it just leave it for my ladies. review_text: Not sure why a few writers are labeling this a "fake". I too have been buying this product since it came out in '96, and purchasing it from a department store discounter in Springfield, MO when I go there in the summer. I cannot see or smell any difference at all. I haven't seen this product in any higher percentage fragrance than the 1 to 3 percent of essential oils that you would normally find in an "eau de cologne" or "toilette" now used interchangeably. According to an on-line definition, the "eau de parfum" is rated at 7 to 14 percent and the "perfume" at 20 to 40 percent. So, you'd have to be pretty well-heeled to afford this size in a perfume. Additionally, I find it difficult to swallow that Amazon's people would be so naive as to be hoodwinked with a "fake".

review_text: Like many others on here I have received my Curve (Green) Bottle and am very disappointed. I bought this from a department store years ago and was very satisfied, so I decided to order this product online through Amazon. The price after all was too good to be true. Since many people buying the 6.8oz from Amazon stated that it is nothing more than a watered down version, I decided to go with the 4.2oz from Amazon but through AAA Perfume LC. The shipment arrived very quickly but the cologne is still fake. When I purchased Curve from a department store the scent lasted for hours, however, this product lasts 15 minutes if that. Very disappointed and I would recommend people skip this or buy it from a department store where you know you are getting an authentic product.

review_text: This is my third bar of Pre de Provence Soap and, once again, I'm impressed! The bars always produce a rich lather and they don't dissolve too quickly in water. Pre de Provence soap lasts forever, or about nine months between my Husband and I with daily showers. The linden soap has a very pleasant, not overwhelming, scent and I look forward to using it each shower. The Shea butter seems to make a difference, my skin always feels so smooth with this soap! The price is simply amazing, too. You can't beat it for high quality soap. I highly recommend this, or any Pre de Provence, soap. I don't think I'll ever buy soap from another company.
product_title: Pre de Provence Artisanal French Soap Bar Enriched with Shea Butter, Quad-Milled For A Smooth & Rich Lather (250 grams) - Linden
product_description: For centuries, the luxury of French-milled soaps has remained the gold standard of excellence. Each time you begin to lather a French made soap, you enter a time and place where quality and craftsmanship have stood still. Traditional French soap is triple-milled to produce a completely uniform and smooth soap, without impurities, thus lasting longer. Every bar of Pre de Provence soap is not only carefully made today by the dedicated soapmakers in Provence following their proud traditions, but quad-milled to be smoother and have a richer lather to create our luxurious feel. Using all pure, natural ingredients enriched with shea butter, you can feel the difference of our unique quad-milling process. Aromatic fragrances transport you to a moment of calmness, vitality, dreamin or well-being. This 150 Gram bar is a great value, the fragrance maintains until the soap is all used up. The soap creates a rich, creamy lather and rinses clean, leaving skin soft and hydrated.

review_text: The soap arrived 2 days after I ordered it. It greatly exceeded my expectations. I ordered it because I missed the linden flower smell I grew up with in Europe but honestly, I was quite skeptical about a soap trapping that flagrance well enough. Turns out I had no reason to worry. The smell is amazing, very authentic and without "fake" chemically tones. If you're worried about it leaving your skin too smelly after a shower, don't. The flagrance washed away, leaving only a very faint smell, which is what I wanted. As soap it performs very well, leaving my skin hydrated and soft. Will buy again.

review_text: I used a Linden soap years ago and thought it smelled like heaven. I bought two bars of Pre de Provence Soap and used it, and it STILL smells like a walk through a wild flower patch. A wonderfully light, clean scent that smells like spring. But it smells NATURAL...not artificial like perfume. Not overpowering at all but it stays on your skin for quite a while. I have pretty sensitive skin and it doesn't dry it out, either. I'd recommend this soap all day long :) Edited to add: I tried the Pomegranate variety. Its fruity smell doesn't hold a candle (in my opinion) to this light flowery fragrance. This scent is AMAZING :)

review_text: I used this product to conduct a small pheromone study in graduate school a number of years ago for a Human Sexuality class. Out of 100 participants, 20% said they felt it worked, the rest were either non-responsive or said it didn't have any effect. The asking price at the time was around $10 a bottle, but I received free single-serving samples from the manufacturer. Most of the studies I've read regarding pheromones in humans suggest we have very limited perception possibly due to evolution. Even though we produce pheromones naturally, we either wash them off or cover them up with fragrances, soaps, lotions, shampoos, etc. Animals and insects, however, still depend on them for attracting a mate, reproduction, and continuing the species. Some brands, however, smell pretty good from the added fragrance. Others smell like something between English Leather and horse pee. In my opinion paying more than $10-$20 for an ounce of this brand or others is a TOTAL waste of money. Furthermore, paying $90+ a bottle is outrageous, unless it comes with a "guarantee".

review_summary: Really BAD Science marketed as a worthless product
review_text: The androstenone nonsense has been around since at least 2001 and not surprisingly internet marketers have cherry-picked science to make a very weak case for this derivative of testosterone to turn your average make "6" into Brad Pitt. B.S. The facts: The ability to even perceive the odor of androsterone is in all likelihood dictated by a single odorant receptor called OR7D4. Not all human being s are even capable of detecting this scent for reasons that are not yet fully understood. There are two variations of this receptor--RT/WM and RT/RT. Those individuals possessing the RT/RT genotype have been experimentally proven to perceive androsterone as offensive: a foul urinous odor or one similar to heavy sweat. Those possessing the former genotype--RT/WM report a less offensive odor, while a few suggest it similar to vanilla or a floral. The implication of the Rockefeller study is obvious: you can't know who can detect the scent or who will find it offensive or, conversely, slightly less offensive. Clearly, the suggestion that androsterone will attract women to men like moths to a flame is utter nonsense. It may very well be that even if you are drop-dead good looking with a body like a Greek God, the woman you're attracted to you may be one who gets a whiff of a urinal when you approach her; at the same time, if you connect with a woman "out of your league" (you're a six and she's a nine) it could be because you're sitting next to her at a bar during the Super Bowl, you're both Patriot fans and they win a nail-biter in overtime. If she's with other girls (no boyfriend) she'll experience a rush of dopamine (The brain chemical that creates euphoria) which will give her a jolt of strong sexual feelings and you could, under those circumstances, suddenly look like a nine to her. The point: figure out a a way to get a girl to experience a dopamine rush and you're going to look a lot sexier to her.

review_summary: The least amount of pheromones legally allowed in a "pheromone product"?
review_text: Mr. Ellsworth's review is pretty much spot on. It does contain androstenone, but in such small quantities that only a dog might notice... but the scent is so powerful that the dog might not after all. It's not a bad scent if you're into cheap, fresh aftershave scents... and the scent does last... but this product is about as good a candidate for scam as I can find, the way it is marketed. It was my first pheromone purchase, and I felt gypped. I tried it at various times, places and levels of application - all the way up to "Oh my God, what did you do, fall into your cologne?" strength. (That is an actual comment I got by the way.) There were absolutely NO hits from this product at all. Not a one. The amount of pheromones in this bottle is so small as to be patently ridiculous. I use products that give me 2.5 micrograms of androstenone PER SPAY and get very good results with even 1 spray. I would have almost literally had to wear the whole bottle to get results like I get with my current products. If you buy this, buy it because you think it smells good. As a cheap cologne oil, it isn't terrible. As a pheromone product, it is positively laughable.

I recalled what my dad always recommended for obnoxious smells and contacted Amazon.com for ClenAir Odor Neutralizer. As soon as I received the gel I placed it in the trunk of my car. Twenty-four hours later - just as the tub's directions advised - no more "Eau de Shrimp Morte"! Thanks, Amazon.com, for carrying such a reliable product and for delivering it so quickly!

review_text: Waltz is my absolute favorite scent from the Tokyo Milk parfum curiousitie line. It manages to be demure & sexy at the same time, floral & feminine without being cloying. It's charming, mysterious, delicious (that linden blossom!) & a bit quirky. It has a Victorian vibe in the best possible sense. Love it (and the gorgeous bottle design is an added perk). On a side note personally this might be more of a spring/summer scent for me, but I could also see it working beautifully all-year-round.

review_text: I love Tokyo Milk fragrances. I own several. I am just trying out Waltz for the first time and I love it. It's not an everyday kind of fragrance though. review_summary: The best scent ever and long-lasting protection!
review_text: I paid $2.80 for this anti-perspirant at Big Lots and I ended up stocking up. The scent is the best that I have ever found. Unlike some anti-perspirants that leave an unpleasant heavy odor on your clothing and you end up having to wash your clothes, this scent is very light and pleasant, but the protection lasts until you wash it off. The only thing that I did find is that it is not entirely "invisible" - it does leave some residue on the inside of your clothing. A great find if you like some scent but can't tolerate perfume-y scents. Recommended.

review_text: I have the hardest time finding a deodorant that smells nice without making me gag from the scent. This is the best one I've found yet... it has a very pleasant scent, almost like coco-butter lotion, that I really enjoy. review_text: Well as the readers of my review can see I am a smelly girl! At least, I used to be! Ever since I tried using this product I've become really popular. My mother says the reason why I have so many friends now is because I've showed that I care about personal hygiene. Also now people will acually hug me! I think that ever since I've started using Secret Platinum my self esteem has just skyrocketed! I feel so loved!!I used to think that I would never get married now I have a special someone! What can I say readers,I think that I love this product more than I love my boyfriend!(Sorry Brian,but at least its not another guy that I love!)

review_text: Thought I'd try something different. Some of the reviews sounded great. I wanted to like it. I absolutely LOVE "Cougar" with pheromones. "Rocket Fuel" on me smells like a pipe tobacco my father used to smoke. I can't wear it. Definitely not sexy or appealing on me. Sad that I wasted 30 bucks. I should have spent that money to double down on "Cougar".
product_title: Love Potion Rocket Fuel ~ 1/3 Fl. Oz. Pheromone Enhanced Perfume Oil for Women
product_description:
Boldly goand you will definitely see stars! An adventuring explorer requires a suitable vehicle to voyage beyond her wildest dreamssometimes a girl needs to hitch her rocket to a star to journey to the farthest reaches of ecstasy, and there's no better blend to get you there than this luscious brown sugar-based scent, especially sexily crafted by our fearless Commander Fox. Fly high with this beloved intoxicating blend of brown sugar and maple syrup, thick buttery vanilla, Tunisian amber and a hint of honeycomb, sprinkled with two kinds of cinnamon and powdered sugar. BROWN & POWDERED SUGARS ~ Attracts love, luck, sweetness and riches. Lust inducing.

review_text: Rocket Fuel III is a staple in my fragrance collection. Truly. From this company and beyond to mainstream commercialized fragrances, Rocket Fuel III will always be part of my personal Top 10. It's sweet and versatile. Much like that fave outfit of yours that you can dress up or down, I feel the same way about this. I can wear it to work, a cocktail party, over to a friend's place, and I will always have people complimenting me and asking me what fragrance I'm wearing. It also smells deliciously mapletastic and would suit anyone!

review_summary: Rocket Fuel is a must have
review_text: On me this one is a mouth watering maple-brown sugar with the vanilla and cinnamon close by. The longer I wear it the more I love it. I have been wearing this one off and on for over a year and have gone through several bottles of it. I never get tired of the scent and to be honest, the combination with the pheros is a head turner. When I wear this one out, I always end up with male attention and I think the scent just makes the perfect ice breaker. So many comments on smelling good I can't begin to count them all. I never want to be without this one on hand.

review_summary: This does smell good enough to eat
review_text: Oh yum, yum, yum! This does smell good enough to eat! It is a delightful mix of brown sugar, maple, and vanilla. It smells like the best pastry you will ever taste all without being sweet enough to make your teeth hurt. I've been told by others around me that this smells of butterscotch. The best part is that the lovely smell brings people closer so the pheromones have a chance to do their work... which they do a treat! Even the foody-phobic perfume enthusiast should consider this one.

review_text: This keeps me from smelling funky through most of the day and keeps me from sweating too badly until about mid-afternoon. However, the smell of this stuff is noxious. There's no detectable trace of tea tree oil and the only resemblance to honeysuckle is that it smells extremely sweet and fruity. It's very powerful--I get whiffs of it all day long and even into the next morning until I shower. I thought it would have a much cleaner smell but it just smells like cheap, sweet perfume.

review_summary: Smells great, keeps you dry but not good for HS
review_text: I have a skin condition called Hidradenitis Suppurativa (HS) that causes abscesses and sores in areas where sweat glands are located, including the underarm. Because of this, it is very hard to find a deodorant that doesn't irritate the condition or make it worse. From my research, I knew that tea tree oil was good for HS so I decided to give this deodorant a try when I saw it at Target. For the first 2 days I wore it, I felt fresh and clean. On the 3rd day, my HS blew up and I was in extreme pain. The deodorant was the only thing that had changed so I discontinued using it and it's now sitting in a drawer with all of the other deodorants I've tried but can't use because of my condition. Overall, I like this deodorant. It smells great and does an excellent job of keeping you dry and fresh. Just don't use it if you have HS.

This is not the first time I've purchased this refill (last time it was from SFA) so I know the bottle comes full. I don't know what happened here but for $225 and ounce, I expect to get the whole bottle! I would have complained and sent it back but I've been out for weeks and I can't live without it any longer. I don't know if I'd order from Scents Amour again, you can find it for the same price anywhere and if you order from Saks, you get the whole bottle.

review_summary: Better off with antiperspirant and deo. This burns!
review_text: This product really has a pleasant, fresh initial smell. Beyond the smell, a better name for this one might be "Pure Heat", or "death Valley" Apparently Old Spice makes both a deodorant and a deodorant with antiperspirant. The deo alone, this product, rather reminds me of pouring gasoline on my underarms and touching a match. That is to say it burns like a SOB. Not only that, it really doesn't deodorize very well after a few hours. So you have funk and fire. Not a group putting out dance hits from back when, just a bad hygenic combo. The Old Spice Matterhorn antiperspirant and deodorant, on the other hand is a wondrous product that lives up to what you're probably looking for. Amazon has it, but you'll pay a pretty penny for it. As for this little lovely product, keep in mind, only you can prevent forest fires. By staying far away from this Matterhorn deodorant.

review_summary: Smells good and it relived my itching problem in my groin area.
review_text: I bought this after I used it at a hotel and I noticed that it relieved the itching problem I had in my groin area. I researched online and found out that the oil from the Lemon verbena has anti fungal and anti- inflammation activity. This was God sent because my problem was persistent even after I tried various medications prescribed by my doctor and by a specialist (dermatologist). Now, I simply bath with this shower gel and my problem is under control. So far, the itching returns if I discontinue using this gel. I also like the smell of this gel. The product is a kind of pricey. I am thinking of buying the lemon verbena oil itself and mixing it with a cheap non-perfumed shower gel.

review_text: Really nice scent fit for a man and yes, it is very effective as an deodorant. There is a lot in the container; you get your monies worth even if it is 3 times the price of the run-of-mill deodorants. Buy this for special occasions and the cheap stuff for the other days. Have this on your shelf for a few days and then you'll be thinking about buying a real double edge razor and using real shaving soap with a genuine boar bristle shaving brush. Ahhh yes, once you start down (or UP rather) the road of finer things, where will it stop? And to think it all started with a better brand of deo.

review_text: I really like this stuff. Better than the sandalwood as far as both fragrance and performance. Pros: -Smells nice but not overpowering, which is exactly what I'm looking for. -No underarm rash (I unfortunately struggle with that with all other deodorants) -Perfect longevity (Lasts almost a full day for me but wears off a little by evening. Most last too long in my opinion) -Washes off with soap in shower (the last thing I want when sleeping is to smell fragrance) -Stick lasts a long time (about a month and a half for me but I apply lightly) Cons: -Might need to apply twice during day (however, as mentioned above I prefer that to the opposite) -The plastic casing is not the best quality (my current one I had to pry off the bottom with a flat head screwdriver and stick it back on to make it turn) -Honestly, it's expensive for deodorant

product_description_filled: Product: Diptyque - Eau Rose Eau de Toilette - 100 ml.

review_text: Gorgeous, fresh, lovely, feminine, not overbearing, elegant--just right. When I first walked out with it on, my hubby inhaled and shouted: "WOW! That's SEXY!" Then proceeded to get totally distracted from trying to leave for dinner and went into a trance and tried to nibble my neck in front of the toddler, LOL--so men like it. The scent shifts throughout the day and has many beautiful, subtle layers, none of which are overpowering, which makes it intimate and subtle, the way a fragrance should be--as opposed to a traffic light or a bulldozer. I find that it lasts longer if I spray it on my clothing instead of on my skin, and I also found that the small rollerball size is a little more potent, for dabbing! Keep making this please, Diptyque. I'm in love with it and it's a classic.

product_description: Rose Fragrance oil If you are looking for the best place to buy Rose fragrance oil then look no further. At Bulk Apothecary we only sell the absolute finest quality ingredients and supplies and our Rose fragrance oil is no different. Our signature fragrances are stronger and last longer than any other supplier online. Pure Rose Fragrance Many people ask us what makes our oils so much different from the competition and the facts are pretty basic. Many suppliers of fragrances dilute their product with cheaper carriers. This allows them to sell their product at prices that are sometime lower than our amazing wholesale price. However don't be fooled. In most cases you will need 5 to 10 times as much oil to get the same effect in your products. Our Rose fragrance oil can be used at .3%. That means that 1 of our .5oz. Rose fragrances can scent an entire gallon of our unscented bases. That is because our pure Rose oils are 100% pure. We never cut our products and that means we have the absolute best quality available anywhere online. This also ensures that our Rose oil will not negatively impact your final product. Many products have a salt curve and inferior grade fragrances can often break that salt curve and consequently break the viscosity of your product. Because our products are 100% pure, they are less likely to cause any issues with your final product.

review_text: This colonge smells amazing. I dare say it smells better than Fierce. This is more of a clubbing/sexy office colonge. This scent definitely help you with the ladies. First day I had more women flocking around me than a purse shop on sunset blvd. OK, maybe not that crazy but it is definitely attractive to the fares sex. This smell seems to go good with casual dress or suite. It has cool soothing qualities to the smell and lasts most of the day. Doesn't last quite as long as fierce and the faded smell is deacent as well. Works better in closed spaces as the smell get very light as people get farther away from you. Give it a couple of extra sprays to clear that up, I usually give two on the skin I.e. chest etc. and three one on clothes, arms, and neck. Seems like alot but after about five mins it evens out nicely and reaches out just enough to wheel them in. You will get complements on the small and most of all you won't be disappointed. I was skeptical at first because I've used fierce for so long, but take a chance. Be bold! And most of all, happy hunting!!!

review_text: I researched eau de colognes and perfumes thoroughly by reading readers' comments and came up with 4711, which turned out to be an excellent choice for a gift. It is good for both men and women, has a light pleasing scent, and is especially good for summer or sub-tropical climes because of its refreshing qualities. Highly recommend.
product_title: 4711 by Muelhens Original Eau de Cologne Splash Nostalgie, Traditional Unisex Fragrance in a Nostalgic Vintage Style Retro Collectable Tin, 6.8 Fluid Ounces
product_description: Fresh and uplifting, there's nothing quite like the classic scent of 4711. A blend of citrus, spices, and woods, this captivating unisex fragrance has been popular with men and women for over 200 years! Served here in a beautiful, collectible vintage tin. </br></br>What makes 4711 Original Eau de Cologne so special is the careful selection of high-quality ingredients and essential oils. The exact composition is still a closely guarded secret. The conscious emphasizing of the light and vitalizing top note of 4711 Original Eau de Cologne gives it its characteristic and pleasant fragrance. </br>The precious ingredients are carefully harmonized. Bergamot, lemon, and orange provide a uniquely revitalizing effect. Lavender and rosemary have a calming and relaxing effect, strengthening the nerves. Neroli, extracted from the blossom of the bitter orange, has a calming effect in the base note, creating a positive mood. </br></br>The fame and notoriety of this light and refreshing fragrance grew and eventually it was renamed after the address of its famous production facility: 4711. The term 'eau de cologne' was copied so frequently even outside of Cologne that it has now become a general term for a type of fragrance. But, 4711 will always be the original 'Eau de Cologne.' </br></br>Made in Germany

review_summary: The true scent of 4711 in a charming package
review_text: Granted that I am fond of tin boxes. Knowing that one day they might not be made any more, I like to have them around because they are practical to store things in boxes with far more character than plain plastic containers. Yet, I purchased this combination hoping that I would get the original scent of 4711, since I have been disappointed of the product that I have been buying in larger flasks because the fragrance was 'diluted, to say the least. I guess that is why they are sold as 'splash'. I like to use the the 4711 as an after shave because it's subtle yet at the same time stays around during the whole day. The splash, on the other hand, was gone in less than a half an hour, no matter how much you'd splash on your face. I am glad to be able to find the genuine 4711 again. The tin box is an added bonus, and it will also stay around for a long time.

product_description: Frankincense oil has been used for thousands of years for beauty, healing and spiritual purposes. The warm, heady fragrance and it's medicinal powers make it a favorite. Excellent for everything from skin care to relieving depression to use in meditation. A common remedy in Ayurveda medicine, its rejuvenating (lifts depression), helps with arthritic and rheumatic pain and is highly prized for anti-aging and skin regenerating properties. Its popular for meditation, promoting grounding, balance and peace.

review_summary: This nice gift set would make a great Christmas gift for a co-worker or friend!
review_text: There were several things that I really liked about this beauty gift set the main one being the glass file and the carrying case for it. I use nail art stickers on my nails, and using the right tools ensures that they will last more than a couple of days. The glass nail file does a much better job of smoothing out the nail art than the regular files that I have been using, and the case that you slide it into keeps it well protected. The tweezers with the light on them is a neat concept that I hadnt used before, although the light needed a battery when I received it, which was disappointing. The perfume atomizer is another big plus for me; having a full or even small sized bottle of perfume in my purse takes up more space than I would like. The atomizer is simple to refill with my favorite scents. The other pieces were just extras for me, as it was the glass nail file and the tweezers from this set that I really wanted, but they also work as expected. This nice gift set would make a great Christmas gift for a co-worker or friend! **I received this product at a discount for testing; the review above is an honest representation of my experience with this product, and has not been influenced in any way.**

review_summary: Unique travel/gift set. The items included truly make it handy when traveling and the items................
review_text: This is really a very unique travel/gift set. The items included truly make it handy when traveling and the items are not typically found bundled together. There are a few items that I really wanted. A) It has a glass nail file with a carrying case. This glass file is very nice and they last for such a long time that this item alone was worth the set. What I really like about a crystal/glass nail file is that you can clean and sanitize it. Besides maintaining its use for much longer periods than regular nail files, the fact that I can clean this is a huge bonus for me. B) The travel perfume atomizer. This is just fantastic for travel/storing in a small bag, etc... it is super simple to fill (fill from the bottom if you've never used one before and can be confusing at first) and there is no need to carry around a full bottle of my favorite perfume. There is a small window so that you can easily identify when it is time to refill. The tweezers set with a built in light is actually very nice. It is comfortable to hold/use and the light is useful. Now these may not end up being your "go-to" tweezers for eyebrow maintenance but they are a fairly good set. The make up brush is a good quality as well and stores away without leaving/getting make up in your purse. As someone that is not typically a fan of 'gift sets', I will say that this is a very nice set. The fact that the items are not typically seen bundled together, makes it one I would enjoy giving as a gift I received this item at not cost for testing. All opinions are my own.

review_text: When I opened the package and immediately put some on my wrist, it made me cry. This fragrance was tied to so many fond memories in my teen years, 1966 to 1969. I wore it constantly. My grandmother use to order it for me from an upscale department store in my hometown of Des Moines, IA. When I found out in the 80's that it was being discontinued, I bought every bottle I could find. Since then I've purchased knock offs but they were mostly watered down imitations. I think this is the real thing. Now, being retired and living on a fixed income, I plan to order once a month until I get a stash that will last me the rest of my life! I will be celebrating my 45th anniversary this month and I plan to surprise my husband by wearing it. He will remember it well.....

review_text: I love the idea of a line of fragrances named for different quality traits or hobbies. It is a cute marketing platform. The packaging, logo, and boxing area all high quality and modern. They make a great gift item or addition to a gift basket. I have bought the sportsman, gentleman, and the beast in this line, and the beast is my favorite of the three as far as the scent. It is definitly the most manly of the scents. The composition of these is great. They look like a candle when opened up and are a great conditioner for the skin in addition to providing fragrance. My husband has even used this as a hair wax or beard conditioner. The scent isn't very potent, so if you want to be the guy at the store that everyone can smell two isles away, this one is not for you. You have to be close enough to touch someone in order to smell the cologne. I received this product for a discount in exchange for my honest review.

review_summary: Glass dish broke due to heat on 1st tea light candle
review_text: I just burned the 1st tea light candle in the diffuser. I used the PROPER candle - a standard metal-enclosed tea light candle (1-1/2" diameter; 5/8" tall). Went to check on it after 2-3 hours. The glass dish had broken. I would expect that if you are anticipating using a candle to heat a glass container, that the glass should be of a type to be able to withstand heat (think PYREX)! The soapstone base is very nice & seems to be sturdy. So SOUVNEAR, feel free to replace the glass dish!

review_summary: GORGEOUS ROSE FRAGRANCE, LIKE WALKING THROUGH A ROSE GARDEN.
review_text: I own several Auric Blends glass roller bottle perfumes. This is the a review of the one called "Rose." "Rose" is a balanced and bright velvety red rose scent for women. You only need a dab on your pulse points (wrists and behind the ears) for a lasting fragrance that stays close to the skin. It's like walking through a rose garden or the classic rose water your grandmother might have kept in the house. This bottle is about 1/3 of an ounce with a screw top. It will last for a few months even with frequent use. It is very convenient to use. Auric Blends also makes "Tea Rose," a lighter, less intense rose. But both are lovely. I love this Rose and the Auric Blends fragrance called "Egyptian Goddess," their most popular fragrance. Rose is a very uplifting scent. This smells natural and clean. I actually now prefer rollerball perfume oils over spray EDT and EDP fragrances. I get many compliments on this fragrance.

review_summary: This smells of citrus and heaven.
review_text: I love this scent and highly recommend it. The top note is citrus, but it's perfectly balanced with a lightly sweet jasmine floral. It fades over time, but you can still catch lingering hints of it in clothing and on skin after several hours. I recommend trying it out as a sample before committing to the high price tag, but I'm thrilled with it.

review_summary: Refreshing, invigorating and desperately in need of menthol...
review_text: Florida Water is iconic and Murray and Lanman's is the most famous Florida Water available. It's light, refreshing, citrusy, outdoorsy (sic.) and a pleasure to splash on after a shave. However, if you want to kick your Florida Water up a notch, I highly recommend adding at least 8-10g of menthol crystals to a new bottle. Pro Tip: pulverize the menthol crystals in mortar and pestle. Add a tablespoon of the Florida Water to the powder. Mix until dissolved. Use a small perfume funnel to add the mixture back into the bottle. Recommended because it's good and inexpensive.

product_description: The US made version of Agua de Florida, commonly known as Florida Water. This cologne is a different formulation than the Peruvian verison. The name refers to the fabled Fountain of Youth, which was said to be located in Florida, as well as the "flowery" nature of the scent.
